title: Melo conomon
taxonomy: Melo conomon is classified within the family Cucurbitaceae. This family includes various species of gourds, melons, and cucumbers. Melo conomon is native to Southeast Asia and has been widely cultivated for its edible fruit. The fruit of Melo conomon is typically round or oval in shape and has a yellow or green rind. It is often used in traditional medicine and as a food source in its native region.
